prose:
The fukui-reactivity calculation for nitrobenzene was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`). The calculation was run in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1.

The most electrophilic site is Carbon (C) at index 4 (0-based index 3), with a Fukui f+ value of 0.49642.
The most nucleophilic site is Carbon (C) at index 5 (0-based index 4), with a Fukui f- value of 0.10729.

The calculation was performed using the PySCF backend. No warnings were reported.
